roman_urdu_english: Aaj ki meeting ka agenda kya hai?
nastaliq_urdu_english: آج کی meeting کا agenda کیا ہے؟
english_translation: What is today's meeting agenda?

roman_urdu_english: Yeh project ki deadline extend nahi ho sakti.
nastaliq_urdu_english: یہ project کی deadline extend نہیں ہو سکتی۔
english_translation: This project's deadline cannot be extended.

roman_urdu_english: Report submit karne se pehle manager ko review karwa lo.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Report submit کرنے سے پہلے manager کو review کروا لو۔
english_translation: Get the report reviewed by the manager before submitting.

roman_urdu_english: Client ne feedback diya hai ke design approve nahi hua.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Client نے feedback دیا ہے کہ design approve نہیں ہوا۔
english_translation: The client has given feedback that the design was not approved.

roman_urdu_english: Kal tak yeh presentation ready honi chahiye.
nastaliq_urdu_english: کل تک یہ presentation ready ہونی چاہیے۔
english_translation: This presentation should be ready by tomorrow.

roman_urdu_english: Team ko yeh task assign kar do aur progress track karte raho.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Team کو یہ task assign کر دو اور progress track کرتے رہو۔
english_translation: Assign this task to the team and keep tracking the progress.

roman_urdu_english: Budget ka issue hai, finance department se confirm karo.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Budget کا issue ہے، finance department سے confirm کرو۔
english_translation: There is a budget issue, confirm with the finance department.

roman_urdu_english: Yeh research paper ka methodology section weak hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: یہ research paper کا methodology section weak ہے۔
english_translation: The methodology section of this research paper is weak.

roman_urdu_english: Literature review mein relevant sources cite nahi kiye gaye.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Literature review میں relevant sources cite نہیں کیے گئے۔
english_translation: Relevant sources were not cited in the literature review.

roman_urdu_english: Data collection ke liye kitna time chahiye?
nastaliq_urdu_english: Data collection کے لیے کتنا time چاہیے؟
english_translation: How much time is needed for data collection?

roman_urdu_english: Supervisor ne thesis ka first draft reject kar diya.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Supervisor نے thesis کا first draft reject کر دیا۔
english_translation: The supervisor rejected the first draft of the thesis.

roman_urdu_english: Yeh algorithm ki time complexity bohat zyada hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: یہ algorithm کی time complexity بہت زیادہ ہے۔
english_translation: The time complexity of this algorithm is very high.

roman_urdu_english: Experiment ke results expected outcomes se match nahi kar rahe.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Experiment کے results expected outcomes سے match نہیں کر رہے۔
english_translation: The experiment results are not matching the expected outcomes.

roman_urdu_english: Conference mein paper present karne ka moqa mila hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Conference میں paper present کرنے کا موقع ملا ہے۔
english_translation: An opportunity to present the paper at the conference has been received.

roman_urdu_english: System ka server down hai, IT department ko inform karo.
nastaliq_urdu_english: System کا server down ہے، IT department کو inform کرو۔
english_translation: The system server is down, inform the IT department.

roman_urdu_english: Yeh bug fix hone mein kam az kam do ghante lagenge.
nastaliq_urdu_english: یہ bug fix ہونے میں کم از کم دو گھنٹے لگیں گے۔
english_translation: This bug will take at least two hours to fix.

roman_urdu_english: Database backup lena mat bhoolna.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Database backup لینا مت بھولنا۔
english_translation: Do not forget to take a database backup.

roman_urdu_english: Software ka latest version install kar lo.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Software کا latest version install کر لو۔
english_translation: Install the latest version of the software.

roman_urdu_english: Network connectivity issue ki wajah se kaam ruk gaya hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Network connectivity issue کی وجہ سے کام رک گیا ہے۔
english_translation: Work has stopped due to a network connectivity issue.

roman_urdu_english: Code review ke baad pull request merge karenge.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Code review کے بعد pull request merge کریں گے۔
english_translation: We will merge the pull request after the code review.

roman_urdu_english: Doctor ne complete bed rest aur proper diet recommend ki hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Doctor نے complete bed rest اور proper diet recommend کی ہے۔
english_translation: The doctor has recommended complete bed rest and a proper diet.

roman_urdu_english: Yeh test results normal range mein nahi hain.
nastaliq_urdu_english: یہ test results normal range میں نہیں ہیں۔
english_translation: These test results are not within the normal range.

roman_urdu_english: Appointment reschedule karni paregi.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Appointment reschedule کرنی پڑے گی۔
english_translation: The appointment will have to be rescheduled.

roman_urdu_english: Insurance claim process karne mein waqt lagta hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Insurance claim process کرنے میں وقت لگتا ہے۔
english_translation: Processing an insurance claim takes time.

roman_urdu_english: Emergency case hai, immediately hospital jana hoga.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Emergency case ہے، immediately hospital جانا ہوگا۔
english_translation: It is an emergency case, we will have to go to the hospital immediately.

roman_urdu_english: Yeh investment ka return on investment kaafi low hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: یہ investment کا return on investment کافی low ہے۔
english_translation: The return on investment of this investment is quite low.

roman_urdu_english: Tax filing ki last date qareeb aa rahi hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Tax filing کی last date قریب آ رہی ہے۔
english_translation: The last date for tax filing is approaching.

roman_urdu_english: Contract ki terms and conditions dobara review karni parein gi.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Contract کی terms and conditions دوبارہ review کرنی پڑیں گی۔
english_translation: The terms and conditions of the contract will need to be reviewed again.

roman_urdu_english: Profit margin is quarter mein significantly kam hui hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Profit margin اس quarter میں significantly کم ہوئی ہے۔
english_translation: The profit margin has decreased significantly this quarter.

roman_urdu_english: Vendor ke saath payment dispute resolve nahi hua abhi tak.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Vendor کے ساتھ payment dispute resolve نہیں ہوا ابھی تک۔
english_translation: The payment dispute with the vendor has not been resolved yet.

roman_urdu_english: Aaj ka lecture cancel ho gaya hai, notice board check karo.
nastaliq_urdu_english: آج کا lecture cancel ہو گیا ہے، notice board check کرو۔
english_translation: Today's lecture has been cancelled, check the notice board.

roman_urdu_english: Assignment ka word limit exceed ho gaya hai, trim karna parega.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Assignment کا word limit exceed ہو گیا ہے، trim کرنا پڑے گا۔
english_translation: The assignment's word limit has been exceeded, it will need to be trimmed.

roman_urdu_english: Semester ke aakhir mein GPA improve karna mushkil hota hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Semester کے آخر میں GPA improve کرنا مشکل ہوتا ہے۔
english_translation: It is difficult to improve GPA at the end of the semester.

roman_urdu_english: Professor ne extra credit ka option diya hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Professor نے extra credit کا option دیا ہے۔
english_translation: The professor has given the option of extra credit.

roman_urdu_english: Online portal par result upload ho gaya hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Online portal پر result upload ہو گیا ہے۔
english_translation: The result has been uploaded on the online portal.

roman_urdu_english: Yeh course ka syllabus bohat demanding hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: یہ course کا syllabus بہت demanding ہے۔
english_translation: The syllabus of this course is very demanding.

roman_urdu_english: Group project mein sab ka equal contribution hona chahiye.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Group project میں سب کا equal contribution ہونا چاہیے۔
english_translation: Everyone should have equal contribution in the group project.

roman_urdu_english: Exam ki preparation ke liye past papers solve karo.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Exam کی preparation کے لیے past papers solve کرو۔
english_translation: Solve past papers to prepare for the exam.

roman_urdu_english: Library mein reference books available nahi hain.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Library میں reference books available نہیں ہیں۔
english_translation: Reference books are not available in the library.

roman_urdu_english: Scholarship ke liye apply karne ki deadline kal hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Scholarship کے لیے apply کرنے کی deadline کل ہے۔
english_translation: The deadline to apply for the scholarship is tomorrow.

roman_urdu_english: Loan application process mein kaafi documentation lagti hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Loan application process میں کافی documentation لگتی ہے۔
english_translation: A lot of documentation is required in the loan application process.

roman_urdu_english: Account ki transaction history review karni hogi.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Account کی transaction history review کرنی ہوگی۔
english_translation: The transaction history of the account will need to be reviewed.

roman_urdu_english: Foreign exchange rate aaj bohat unfavorable hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Foreign exchange rate آج بہت unfavorable ہے۔
english_translation: The foreign exchange rate is very unfavorable today.

roman_urdu_english: Investment portfolio diversify karna risk kam karta hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Investment portfolio diversify کرنا risk کم کرتا ہے۔
english_translation: Diversifying the investment portfolio reduces risk.

roman_urdu_english: Credit score improve kiye baghair mortgage milna mushkil hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Credit score improve کیے بغیر mortgage ملنا مشکل ہے۔
english_translation: It is difficult to get a mortgage without improving the credit score.

roman_urdu_english: Online banking portal par suspicious activity flag hui hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Online banking portal پر suspicious activity flag ہوئی ہے۔
english_translation: Suspicious activity has been flagged on the online banking portal.

roman_urdu_english: Yeh decision data driven hona chahiye, assumptions par nahi.
nastaliq_urdu_english: یہ decision data driven ہونا چاہیے، assumptions پر نہیں۔
english_translation: This decision should be data driven, not based on assumptions.

roman_urdu_english: Stakeholders ko regular updates dete rehna communication gap khatam karta hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Stakeholders کو regular updates دیتے رہنا communication gap ختم کرتا ہے۔
english_translation: Giving regular updates to stakeholders eliminates the communication gap.

roman_urdu_english: Problem solving ke liye root cause analysis zaroori hai.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Problem solving کے لیے root cause analysis ضروری ہے۔
english_translation: Root cause analysis is necessary for problem solving.

roman_urdu_english: Long term planning ke baghair short term wins meaningless hain.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Long term planning کے بغیر short term wins meaningless ہیں۔
english_translation: Short term wins are meaningless without long term planning.

roman_urdu_english: Aaj ki meeting ka agenda kya hai?
nastaliq_urdu_english: آج کی meeting کا agenda کیا ہے؟
english_translation: What is today's meeting agenda?

roman_urdu_english: Yeh project ki deadline extend nahi ho sakti.
nastaliq_urdu_english: یہ project کی deadline extend نہیں ہو سکتی۔
english_translation: This project's deadline cannot be extended.

roman_urdu_english: Report submit karne se pehle manager ko review karwa lo.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Report submit کرنے سے پہلے manager کو review کروا لو۔
english_translation: Get the report reviewed by the manager before submitting.

roman_urdu_english: Client ne feedback diya hai aur design approve nahi hua.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Client نے feedback دیا ہے اور design approve نہیں ہوا۔
english_translation: The client has given feedback and the design was not approved.

roman_urdu_english: Team ko yeh task assign kar do aur progress track karte raho.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Team کو یہ task assign کر دو اور progress track کرتے رہو۔
english_translation: Assign this task to the team and keep tracking the progress.

roman_urdu_english: Budget ka issue hai, finance department se confirm karo.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Budget کا issue ہے، finance department سے confirm کرو۔
english_translation: There is a budget issue, confirm with the finance department.

roman_urdu_english: Kal tak yeh presentation ready honi chahiye.
nastaliq_urdu_english: کل تک یہ presentation ready ہونی چاہیے۔
english_translation: This presentation should be ready by tomorrow.

roman_urdu_english: Main abhi urgent task ke liye office ja rahi hun.
nastaliq_urdu_english: میں ابھی urgent task کے لیے office جا رہی ہوں۔
english_translation: I am going to the office right now for an urgent task.

roman_urdu_english: Manager ne kaha hai ke project deadline extend nahi hogi.
nastaliq_urdu_english: Manager نے کہا ہے کہ project deadline extend نہیں ہوگی۔
english_translation: The manager has said that the project deadline will not be extended.

roman_urdu_english: Agar tum bimar ho toh leave le lo.
nastaliq_urdu_english: اگر تم بیمار ہو تو leave لے لو۔
english_translation: If you are sick, take a leave.
